title: datura rubra
intro: Datura rubra, also known as the red angel's trumpet, is a type of flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, antiviral, and antifungal properties. The plant contains various alkaloids, including scopolamine and hyoscyamine, which have been shown to have health benefits such as reducing anxiety and inflammation, and improving sleep quality. Datura rubra can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or dried flower, and is often used in homeopathic and naturopathic medicine.
